programs.name:
Desktop Data Capture allows enterprise customers to:
1. Reuse Existing Forms: Instantly run complex forms on desktop without rebuilding them in Flows (ABB - row 24)
2. Pause & Resume: Let field workers start a form on mobile and seamlessly finish it on desktop. (Nisource VOCs, VOC- Experience site)
programs.full_name:
Desktop Data Capture allows enterprise customers to:

programs.name: The Field Service barcode scanner (Data Capture, Mobile Flows, Inventory, and Nimbus plugin) currently scans items one by one. Supporting multi-scanning (capturing multiple barcodes at once) will optimize key workflows like Pickups - Drop-off, and multi-meter readings in apartment blocks.

programs.name: Enable real-time, field-based color coding on map layers (Work Order related lists) in online and offline modes. Map markers update automatically when status fields transition (e.g., Pending = Yellow, Completed = Green), allowing field users to easily distinguish record statuses in high-density areas
programs.full_name: Enable real-time, field-based color coding on map layers (Work Order related lists) in online and offline modes. Map markers update automatically when status fields transition (e.g., Pending = Yellow, Completed = Green), allowing field users to easily distinguish record statuses in high-density areas

programs.name: Standard GPS gets technicians to a building's address, but it doesn't help them navigate complex indoor sites like hospitals, airports, malls, building as key details like floor is not standard or exposed by default to mobile users. By making indoor details, like exact entrances location, floor numbers, and tips from previous techs - easily accessible in the app, we can eliminate wasted search time for new technicians and contractors visiting a site for the first time. (reference experiences Uber eats, Walt, Amazon, etc.)
programs.full_name: Standard GPS gets technicians to a building's address, but it doesn't help them navigate complex indoor sites like hospitals, airports, malls, building as key details like floor is not standard or exposed by default to mobile users. By making indoor details, like exact entrances location, floor numbers, and tips from previous techs - easily accessible in the app, we can eliminate wasted search time for new technicians and contractors visiting a site for the first time. (reference experiences Uber eats, Walt, Amazon, etc.)

programs.name: Field technicians need a single, intelligent hub to search records and gain real-time geospatial context - such as finding nearby service appointments, assets,  spare parts. By combining data from Salesforce and ArcGIS with context-aware logic, the platform can automatically interpret what the tech needs without requiring manual filtering. (GIS Search VOC)
programs.full_name: Field technicians need a single, intelligent hub to search records and gain real-time geospatial context - such as finding nearby service appointments, assets,  spare parts. By combining data from Salesforce and ArcGIS with context-aware logic, the platform can automatically interpret what the tech needs without requiring manual filtering. (GIS Search VOC)

programs.name: Technicians currently waste time toggling between the field service app and third-party navigation tools just to copy addresses and check traffic. By embedding ETA in agentic experience, techs get precise, schedule-aware travel estimates - like knowing exactly when to leave for tomorrow's first appointment taking into account the vehicel they use, real time traffic, etc. - all in one place without context switching
programs.full_name: Technicians currently waste time toggling between the field service app and third-party navigation tools just to copy addresses and check traffic. By embedding ETA in agentic experience, techs get precise, schedule-aware travel estimates - like knowing exactly when to leave for tomorrow's first appointment taking into account the vehicel they use, real time traffic, etc. - all in one place without context switching

programs.name: Currently, technicians are limited to static routes and often switch to third-party apps—manually copying and pasting addresses. Integrating dynamic, schedule-aware routing into the field app gives techs flexible, real-time control. They can easily preview routes for upcoming days, navigate to specific appointments, or even add mid-route stops like gas stations—all without leaving their workflow
programs.full_name: Currently, technicians are limited to static routes and often switch to third-party apps—manually copying and pasting addresses. Integrating dynamic, schedule-aware routing into the field app gives techs flexible, real-time control. They can easily preview routes for upcoming days, navigate to specific appointments, or even add mid-route stops like gas stations—all without leaving their workflow
